title: Wastewater directive debate remains wide open, says Polish MEP [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Polish MEP Łukacijewska has called for a Commission response on the 'stop the clock' mechanism, pausing implementation of the Urban Wastewater Treatment Directive
summary_public: Polish MEP Łukacijewska has called for a Commission response on the 'stop the clock' mechanism, pausing implementation of the Urban Wastewater Treatment Directive
